description: To the north is the Bedroom1, to the east is the south hall
To the north is the north hall, to the east is the diving room and to the west is the bedroom2
To the north is the kitchen, to the west is the south hall
To the south is the Bedroom2, to the east is the north hall
To the north is the Balcony, to the south is the south hall, to the east is the kitchen and to the west is the bedroom1
To the west is the north hall, to the south is the diving room
To the south is the north hall
